body_txt: Someone takes their sweet time in a bathroom while another person (or several people) is yelling at them through the door to hurry up and finish. The offender may be taking an absurdly long bath or shower, adjusting their hair or makeup, being picky about what clothes to wear, reading on the toilet, or anything else that takes a comically long amount of time and annoys other people desperately needing to go #1. This trope is pretty common with young siblings, due to their tendency to fight over every little thing and a mutual need to get ready for school in the morning. (The more siblings there are, the funnier it is. A family with Massive Numbered Siblings might end up forming a queue outside the bathroom.) One sibling might even hog the bathroom on purpose just to annoy the other(s). This does not count if someone has legitimate reasons to be using the bathroom for a lengthy amount of time, for example, if they have a medical condition. Variations: Related:
